title: Entity Stay Near Noteblock Behavior
description: The entity will attempt to toss the items from its inventory to a nearby recently played noteblock.

listen_time.title: Listen Time
listen_time.description: Sets the time an entity should stay near a noteblock after hearing it.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• allay: 5

speed.title: Speed
speed.description:
Sets the entity's speed when moving toward the block.

Sample values:
• allay: 8

start_distance.title: Start Distance
start_distance.description:
Sets the distance the entity needs to be away from the block to attempt to start the goal.

Sample values:
• allay: 16

stop_distance.title: Stop Distance
stop_distance.description:
Sets the distance from the block the entity will attempt to reach.

Sample values:
• allay: 4
